evals.name: contribute-full-flow
evals.prompt: I want to contribute to langchain-ai/langchain — help me find a good first issue and understand the codebase before I start.
evals.expected_output: Should: (1) search for good-first-issue/help-wanted in that repo, (2) run the AI policy pre-flight check, (3) produce a codebase recon report following the template, (4) score 3-5 issues with the difficulty rubric. Should NOT skip the pre-flight check or jump straight to implementation.

assertions.name: searches_entry_point_issues
assertions.description: Searches for good-first-issue or help-wanted labeled issues in the repo
assertions.check: Searches for issues with entry-point labels and presents candidates

assertions.name: runs_ai_policy_preflight
assertions.description: Runs or references the AI policy pre-flight check before any implementation
assertions.check: Pre-flight check executed or referenced with a verdict (CLEAR/DISCLOSE/CAUTION/STOP)

assertions.name: produces_recon_report
assertions.description: Produces a codebase recon report with architecture, conventions, and build commands
assertions.check: Structured recon covering architecture, build/test commands, and coding conventions

assertions.name: scores_issues_with_rubric
assertions.description: Scores at least 2 issues using the 6-dimension difficulty rubric
assertions.check: At least 2 issues scored with the Scope/Complexity/Test/Breaking/Domain/Familiarity dimensions

evals.name: implement-and-pr
evals.prompt: I've picked issue #31802 in langchain-ai/langchain (EvaluationResult.feedback_config silently drops dict data). Help me implement a fix and open a PR. The issue is a Pydantic model that drops unknown fields — the fix should make feedback_config accept arbitrary dict data.
evals.expected_output: Should: (1) run setup-repo.sh or address the co-authorship rule before first commit, (2) implement a fix matching project conventions, (3) write tests, (4) produce a plain-language summary and WAIT for confirmation before running gh pr create. Should NOT skip the pre-PR summary gate or auto-open the PR without asking.

assertions.name: addresses_coauthorship_rule
assertions.description: Runs setup-repo.sh or explicitly addresses Rule 1 (no AI co-authorship) before committing
assertions.check: References setup-repo.sh, commit-msg hook, or disabling AI attribution before first commit

assertions.name: matches_project_conventions
assertions.description: Implementation follows project conventions (commit format, code style, test patterns)
assertions.check: Uses conventional commit format and matches the project's coding patterns

assertions.name: writes_tests
assertions.description: Writes or proposes tests for the fix
assertions.check: Includes test code or describes what tests to write for the fix

assertions.name: plain_language_summary_gate
assertions.description: Produces a plain-language summary and waits for confirmation before gh pr create
assertions.check: Presents a summary explaining what/why/how before opening PR, asks for user confirmation

evals.name: post-merge-leverage
evals.prompt: My PR just got merged into vercel/next.js — I fixed a race condition in the App Router's prefetch cache that was causing stale data on client-side navigations. PR #67890. Help me write this up for my resume and draft an X post about it.
evals.expected_output: Should produce: (1) a resume bullet using the verb+what+project(scale)+impact formula, (2) an X/Twitter thread draft using the 5-tweet formula, (3) note that LinkedIn/X drafts should be handed off to x-writing/humanizer skills for voice. Should reference the actual PR number and project details.

assertions.name: resume_bullet_formula
assertions.description: Produces a resume bullet using action-verb + what + project(scale) + impact formula
assertions.check: Resume bullet with verb, specific contribution, Next.js + star count, and impact

assertions.name: x_thread_format
assertions.description: Produces an X/Twitter thread draft in multi-tweet format
assertions.check: Multi-tweet thread with hook, problem, approach, learning, and link tweets

assertions.name: references_pr_details
assertions.description: References the actual PR number and project details
assertions.check: Mentions PR #67890, race condition, prefetch cache, Next.js

assertions.name: skill_handoff_mention
assertions.description: Mentions handoff to x-writing or humanizer skills for final voice/tone
assertions.check: References x-writing and/or humanizer skills for tone polishing
